about_quotes.speaker: Maxine Sullivan
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewer mentions Viola McCoy in the context of Cliff Smith's career (1925), but the interviewee (Maxine Sullivan) does not mention knowing, meeting, or working with Viola McCoy.

about_quotes.speaker: Alberta Hunter
about_quotes.evidence: I've always listened to her songs, Viola McCoy... I listened to her all the time... Never trying to copy, just enjoying them

about_quotes.speaker: Howard R. Scott
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] Viola McCoy? [INTERVIEWEE] You see, when I made those records, we didn't have singers.
